title: Case Converter Pro Launched
description: Convert text between 13 different casings including camelCase, snake_case, PascalCase, dot.case, path/case and CONSTANT_CASE with live preview cards.

title: Added Bullet Point Generator
description: Convert blocks of paragraphs, notes, or essays into organized lists. Supports circular, square, standard bullet symbols, or arrows.

title: Added Remove Emojis Tool
description: Instantly purge Unicode emojis and flags from social media posts, messages, and document copy while preserving text spaces.

title: Added Remove Special Characters
description: Strip heavy symbols, equations, and punctuation from strings while keeping digits and raw letters securely locally.

title: Added Paragraph Formatter
description: Convert messy AI walls of text or ChatGPT clipboard content into neat, readable paragraphs with standard indents.

title: Added Random Text Generator
description: Generate dynamic words, sentences, and paragraphs styled for corporate, marketing, conversational or placeholder needs.

title: Added Lorem Ipsum Generator
description: Generate highly customizable placeholder Latin dummy text segments instantly for layout, prototyping, and copywriting.

title: Added Remove Empty Lines
description: Prune blank lines, whitespace spacers, and redundant carriage spaces instantly in our offline formatter.

title: Added Text Repeater
description: Repeat lines, words, phrases, or custom templates instantly inside direct client-side memory fields.

title: Added Sentence Counter
description: Calculate sentence totals, words, characters, and estimate reading pacing instantly inside a 100% private sandbox.

title: Added Grammar Checker
description: Audit punctuation, common spelling issues, and enhance general readability using a 100% secure offline parser.

title: Added Keyword Density Checker
description: Measure keyword distribution and density percentages for SEO web copywriting in real-time.

title: Optimized Core SEO Setup
description: Deeply optimized metadata tag rendering, JSON-LD schemas, and index paths across all 20 text utility pages.

title: Enhanced Mobile Experience
description: Rebuilt fluid grids, oversized touch selections, and typography hierarchies for a native feels on all handheld devices.
